markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session to review SEO analysis, content strategy, and discuss French website deprecation for Siit.](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Siit's authority score (28) is average among competitors; focus on increasing referring domains](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Content strategy will target 3-4 clusters initially, testing broader topics beyond core ITSM](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [French website deprecation recommended but with controlled, phased approach to mitigate traffic loss](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
  - [Critical action: Submit XML sitemap to Google Search Console to improve indexing speed and coverage](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)

## Topics

### SEO Analysis

  - [Siit's authority score: 28 (average among competitors, room for improvement)](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Referring domains more important than total backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Ranking for 244 organic keywords, primarily informational](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Targeting keyword difficulty of 30-40 initially](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Clusters identified: ITSM, team building, workplace efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [Approach: Test 3-4 clusters for \~1 month, then refine based on performance](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
  - [Open to exploring broader topics beyond core ITSM](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Integration-specific content (e.g., Slack, MS Teams) considered lower priority](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Comparison articles (e.g., Siit vs. Zendesk) to be evaluated carefully](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)

### French Website Deprecation

  - [Recommendation: Phase out French site due to maintenance challenges](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=2054.0)
  - [Current non-brand traffic: France (220 clicks/3 months) vs. US (50 clicks/3 months)](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=2332.0)
  - [Strategy:](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=2466.0)
    1.  Focus on building English content
    2.  Implement 301 redirects for high-traffic pages
    3.  Create a general redirect rule (French to English)
    4.  Monitor performance for 3-6 months before full deprecation

### Technical SEO Issues

  - [Critical: XML sitemap not submitted to Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [Page speed improvements needed (details to be provided)](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=2269.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Carmel: Upgrade fwd.digital's permissions on Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=1973.0)
  - [Carmel: Send Fletch PMM materials and revise company brief](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
  - [Carmel: Review content clusters in Airtable (to be shared) and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
  - [fwd.digital: Share calibration articles by Monday/Tuesday for review](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
  - [fwd.digital: Provide instructions for submitting XML sitemap to Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [fwd.digital: Refine content strategy based on updated company brief](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
  - [Team: Review calibration articles before next meeting (Wednesday)](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
  - [Chalom: Oversee phased approach to French website deprecation](https://fathom.video/share/gEVdH5zy2CUm4bSGJ9VS-Q8oo2Ryr3AP?tab=summary&timestamp=2466.0)
